details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Easy to Use, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Waterproof

about_item: MEMORY FOAM: The EHEYCIGA orthopedic dog bed features memory foam and egg crate foam to provide even support and pressure relief. It offers a good balance of softness and support, making it particularly suitable for elderly dogs to alleviate joint pressure.

SOFA BED DESIGN: This bolster dog bed is designed with 3-sided bolsters to offer additional support for your pet’s neck and head, promoting restful sleep. The surrounding sides encourage your dog to snuggle in and enjoy a comfortable night's rest.
WATERPROOF COVER: A waterproof film is positioned between the fleece surface and the bottom fabric, ensuring the dog bed remains dry. However, the faux linen sides are not waterproof.

EXTREME COMFORT & MULTIPLE SIZES: The sleeping surface is covered with cozy fleece, creating a soft and inviting sleeping area for your pet. Whatever the size of your dog, we have a dog bed suitable for medium, large, and extra-large breeds.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Our dog bed features a removable and washable cover with a zipper closure, making it easy to clean. Remove the foam insert, and the cover can be washed in a machine. Please note that the foam insert is not washable. Allow the bed to expand for 24-48 hours after unpacking.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find this dog bed to be of excellent quality, with plenty of room for their pets to stretch out. They appreciate its firm foam mattress, easy washability, and consider it great value for the price. The bed receives positive feedback for its comfort, with pets loving to lay in it, and its suitability for senior dogs, particularly Great Danes. While some customers find it durable, others report issues with the fabric not holding up well.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect size for large 🐕
authors_reviews.text: I was honestly amazed and shocked when I received these dog beds! The size and quality completely exceeded my expectations. I have two German Shepherds, and I originally purchased two beds—but to my surprise, one bed is actually big enough for both of them to comfortably share. That alone says a lot about how spacious it is!The bed is not only large, but also incredibly soft and well-made. It looks beautiful and feels like it’s built to last. My dogs took to it immediately and seem so comfortable and relaxed.I’m extremely pleased with this purchase—it is definitely worth the money. I would highly recommend this bed to anyone with German Shepherds or other large breed dogs. If you’re looking for something spacious, cozy, and high-quality for your furry friends, this is the one!😉🫠🙃
authors_reviews.author: SnuggleBunny

authors_reviews.title: Great bed for a great price
authors_reviews.text: Great bed, and definitely waterproof!Immediately upon giving to my pups, one decided to pee on it. To my great surprise and relief no liquid went through the covering to the foam mattress, and the covering was extremely easy to wash and dry on the delicate cycle.This bed is big enough for 2-70 pound pups to both sleep comfortably and it is very firm not too squishy at all.
authors_reviews.author: Natasha

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable, durable and easy to wash.
authors_reviews.text: If you’re looking for a comfortable, supportive, and well-made dog bed, this orthopedic medium-size option is honestly a great buy.The standout feature is the orthopedic memory foam. It provides solid support for joints and pressure points, which is especially helpful if your dog is older or just likes to lounge comfortably. You can tell it’s not one of those cheap beds that flatten out quick it holds its shape well and gives real cushioning. The materials feel durable and high quality, not flimsy. The stitching is solid, and the fabric doesn’t feel like it’ll tear easily. It definitely gives that premium feel compared to cheaper stuffed beds.My dog is not a chewer so I wouldn’t be able to give a review on that, but material feels like it holds well.
authors_reviews.author: Gerardo

authors_reviews.title: The babies love it!!
authors_reviews.text: They didn’t even give me a chance to pick it up to let it fluff when I assembled it, they both crawled right in. It’s the perfect size for what I was looking for. They can both snuggle during the day and maybe spend a little less time jumping on and off the couch. And the black and white guy can stretch out at night when he gets tired of being cramped on our bed. He is 68 pounds and very long. The white baby is 75 pounds. This is the 48” x 35”. Very nice look to it so it is attractive in the living room. Nice, soft fabric and seems to be as sturdy and supportive as I wanted without being hard, tempuroedic material that needs to be warmed before softening. I did not smell any odor at all. The bolsters seem to give the right support for them to lean and rest their heads. It was pretty easy to get together myself despite the size so I am not worried about washing the cover and putting it back together. They both love it already so I think this was a great purchase!!
authors_reviews.author: Joy M. Thiel

authors_reviews.title: A nice thick bed; fits perfectly in large crate. Fabric threads easily pull.
authors_reviews.text: Initially, I wasn’t crazy about this bed as it seemed kind of hard and flat. After two days fabric threads were pulling out, and that irritated me as well. After all, dogs do have nails, and they do get groomed and the fabric shouldn’t pull from just walking on it. Then my dog decided to get to the underside and start eating it, but by now the bed has plumped up and is very nice and comfortable. I have lost a lot of the foam rubber underneath the side because the bottom fabric is so thin he was able to tear and eat it. Overall, for the price, it’s a very nice bed if you don’t have a heavy tour like I apparently do in this 11 month old puppy. Fits the crate perfectly.
authors_reviews.author: Jeanette Nelson

authors_reviews.title: Great Bed!
authors_reviews.text: So I absolutely LOVE this dog bed but not for the reason it's intended for. I got this pup bed for my pup but she hasn't slept in it once. My 4 year old daughter decided this was going to be her bed in my room bedroom. She absolutely LOVES sleeping in this dog bed. She's had a few accidents while sleeping in this bed and the bed easily unzips and can go in the washer. It's super easy to put back together after going in the washer and dryer. It's held its shape even though I've had to wash the cover multiple times. The stuffing is perfect and it's like a little mini mattress. The bed is very sturdy and has been great for my 4 year old daughter. My daughter absolutely refuses to sleep in her room and this gives her a spot to sleep in my room that is comfortable for her.
authors_reviews.author: Sara

authors_reviews.title: Great bed. Great value! Beyond expectations.
authors_reviews.text: Very plush padding! Really is sized as listed so unlike the loose foam stuffed pet beds that you can squish into any shape or location, this bed is one solid piece of egg foam with a top layer of very comfy flat foam. You can use it with either side up, but we put the flat side up and egg carton foam towards floor. Great bed. Very good value!
authors_reviews.author: Ritbey

authors_reviews.title: High Quality and the perfect Size
authors_reviews.text: It's hard to find a bed that actually fits an extra-large dog comfortably, but this one is perfect. The Size is exactly as described and the bolster Design gives them a nice place to rest their head. It's a great Value for a high-Quality bed that doesn't flatten out. I bought two for both my big dogs and they both respect the bed too. Easy assembly, affordable stuffing and dogs all enjoy it!
authors_reviews.author: Bootlah

other_countries_reviews.title: Great bed
other_countries_reviews.text: Got this for my girl GSD/Husky Mix and she loves this bed definitely a good one. Recommend for people looking for a suitable beds for there dogs my dog is around 30kg and fits perfect and she likes hanging off the opening if you have a larger get get a bigger size 41x27 size purchased.
other_countries_reviews.author: 1AnndOnlee

other_countries_reviews.title: Not orthopeadic
other_countries_reviews.text: Just egg crate, not orthopeadic at all, can not stand any weight of you furr baby. Do not buy. When my dog tried to lie on mattress, he was lying on floor. Definitely not orthopeadic etc
other_countries_reviews.author: Cindy Kruger

other_countries_reviews.title: Good quality
other_countries_reviews.text: Very comfortable for a large dog, you get exactly what’s on the picture - it works a treat!
other_countries_reviews.author: Joseph Meissner

other_countries_reviews.title: Dog bed
other_countries_reviews.text: Ordered a large and received a small also base of bed was ripped could only put one reason for return which is ridiculous! When I receive my payment will be ordering another because the bed itself is lovely
other_countries_reviews.author: Ordered a large and received a small also the base of the bed was ripped could only put one reason for return which is ridiculous!

other_countries_reviews.title: Do not recommend
other_countries_reviews.text: Fabric is poor quality not worth the price quoted.
